sales.description:
Baktrian Kingdom, Demetrios II, Tetradrachm, ca. 175-170 BC, Silver, NGC
Bust of Demetrios II, diademed and draped, right, all within bead-and-reel border., Athena standing facing, holding spear and shield set on ground; monogram under the shaft., Graded NGC Ch AU★ 55-58, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 5/5 - die shift. Mint State! Slight die shift on reverse. Magnificent golden iridescent toning. 
We note the unusual position of the monogram (consisting of a Π and an Α), positioned under Athena's spea...

sales.description:
Ionia, Tetradrachm, ca. 140-135 BC, Lebedos, Pedigree, Silver, NGC, Ch XF
Head of Athena right, wearing laureate and triple-crested Attic helmet and earrings., Owl standing right, head facing, with closed wings, perched on club between two filleted cornucopias; all within olive wreath., Graded NGC Ch XF Strike: 4/5 Surface: 3/5, edge marks. 
Attractive light grey tones. Struck under Korabos' magistracy. Very rare magistrate.
Ex Ceresio 26 September 1987, 126; Giessener Münzhandlung 48, 1990...

Reverse: Athena Alkidemos advancing l. brandishing thunderbold and shield. HGC Vol. 3, 1042; SNG Cop. 1199-1202. NGC graded Fine; Strike: 5/5, Surface: 2/5 bent.  Pleasing antique cabinet toning on both sides.  Estimated Value $300 - UP

sales.description:
Ancients
TROAS. Ilium (Troy). Ca. 188-133 BC. AR tetradrachm (32mm, 16.86 gm, 11h). NGC AU 5/5 - 3/5. Head of Athena right, hair loose over shoulders, wearing crested and laureate Attic helmet / AΘHNAΣ / IΛIAΔOΣ / ANTIΦANOY / KΛE-ΩNOΣ, Athena Ilias advancing right on groundline, spear in right hand resting over right shoulder, distaff in left, wearing polos and chiton; owl standing right, head facing, to right. Bellinger in ANS MN 8, 18. Bellinger, Troy T 53.
